## omqctl storage ensure

Create a storage if it does not exist

### Synopsis

The 'storage ensure' command creates a storage only if it does not already exist. This is an idempotent operation.

```
omqctl storage ensure <name> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for ensure
```
